raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The City of San José's Vision Zero strategy aims to eliminate deaths and serious injuries on roadways.",
    "Traffic fatalities in San José have doubled in the past 10 years, from 29 in 2010 to 60 in 2021.",
    "30 to 50 percent of fatal and severe traffic injuries occur on just 17 corridors identified as Vision Zero Priority Safety Corridors.",
    "The East San José Corridor Safety Improvement Project will provide key safety improvements along 4.7 miles of Senter Road.",
    "The project includes a concrete buffer between cyclists and vehicles and a new traffic signal at a dangerous intersection.",
    "San José received a $425K grant to redesign Senter Road through Caltrans’ Sustainable Transportation Planning Grant program.",
    "In 2021, San José implemented 'quick build' improvements based on consultants' recommendations."
  ]
}
```
